title: Nametag craft
description: Makes nametag craftable in older versions of minecraft
body:
**Nametag craft**

This mod finally makes Name Tags craftable in older versions of Minecraft

Stop hunting for dungeons or fishing for hours just to name your pets and mobs!

**Main features:**

- Adds a balanced crafting recipe for Name Tags

- Perfect for older versions of Minecraft

- No more relying on random loot luck

- Simple and lightweight for any modpack
__________________________________________________________________
